MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on calendar for hearing this day for Settlement Conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patricia J. Van Steenberge. Williams Steven C, esq. represented the Plaintiff. There being no appearance by the defendant, the Court orders the matter off Settlement Conference; the request of jury trial is stricken and the trial date is confirmed.
